missing_critical_conditions_added: Each classification must include per-item provenance and uncertainty.
Official-present language must mean source-index presence only, not acquired payload or runnable readiness.
Candidates must avoid approving, inventing, or expanding beyond requested component/model-family pairs.
overfit_risks: Fixture specificity is intentional for this calibration.
Equivalent state labels are allowed when semantics match the gate.
unsafe_assumptions_corrected: U1 LTspice/demo evidence is not permission to run, package, or publish payloads.
J1 gated status is fixture-provided, not newly verified by login or browsing.
Downstream handoff may carry source-index candidates and blockers only.
